description: Brazilian skinhead group based in the ABC region of São Paulo, founded in 1987 as a dissident from Carecas do Subúrbio. The group accepts Afro-Brazilian members and declares itself nationalist and anti-communist, but uses swastikas and Nazi greetings. Members have been accused of several murders, including the beating death of Edson Néris da Silva. The group currently has 250 members and is less active than in the 1980s and 1990s.
